'''Nellac Kram''' was [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] in the [[Bon'nyuw-Luq sector/Legends|Bon'nyuw-Luq sector]]. The [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] ''[[Nartissteu]]'' was based out of Nellac Kram.

==Population==
By [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], Nellac Kram boasted a population of 100 million to 500 million [[Sentience/Legends|sentients]].<ref name="TEA" />

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Nellac Kram was named by author [[Timothy Zahn]] after Mark Callen, a fan.<ref name="HTTE20">''[[Heir to the Empire]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Heir to the Empire]]'' {{Ab|Heir to the Empire (unabridged audiobook)}} {{Mo}}
